approach: Validated an exact S_12 destroyed-label row-order quotient for the retained source-record-21 frozen order-30 boundary, blocked the canonical source vector, and classified exactly one subsequent SAT model.

strategy.mechanism: Remove the non-invariant Hamming counter, impose lexicographically nondecreasing 30-bit destroyed-to-core rows, exhaustively validate tied-row coverage, and permit one source-blocked SAT model.

hypothesis: The row-order quotient retains every boundary orbit, including tied rows, and one source-blocked model can be exactly classified without resuming labelled CEGAR.
discriminating_test: Enumerate all 2^21 labelled four-core/three-destroyed graphs and the complete four-bit comparator truth table, verify the sorted source against the regenerated no-Hamming CNF, then run CaDiCaL once with seed 1 for 30 seconds.

search_efficiency.naive_space: 2^426 labelled boundary assignments after fixing 435 of 861 order-42 edges; raw generation touches 708162 five-sets.
search_efficiency.chosen_mechanism: Static row ordering with exact prefix-equality gadgets, retaining all 66 destroyed-to-destroyed variables and all 196998 raw Ramsey clauses.
search_efficiency.estimated_or_measured_savings: The exact represented primary count falls from 2^426 to 2^66*C(2^30+11,12), a factor of 479001570.5570708...; the formula has 745 variables and 198912 base clauses instead of 155976 variables and 508157 clauses, although solver timings are not comparable because the Hamming restriction was removed.
search_efficiency.soundness_guard: General relabelling proof, exhaustive 2^21 tied-row gate, all-auxiliary comparator truth table, independent physical-clause reconstruction, two graph checkers, and an adversarial destroy-label transposition.

space_reduction.ambient_space: 2^861 labelled graphs on the fixed 42-vertex set
space_reduction.represented_space_before: 2^426 boundary assignments after fixing the labelled order-30 core
space_reduction.eliminated_or_quotiented: Destroy-label copies distinguished only by the order of their twelve 30-bit frozen-core rows
space_reduction.coverage_scope: The source-record-21 labelled frozen core and destroy set {2,3,10,12,14,25,27,30,36,37,38,41}
space_reduction.soundness_basis: Every completion can be relabelled by sorting destroyed vertices. Exhaustive tied-row controls and an independent transposition audit verify implementation coverage.
space_reduction.remaining_unknown: Core automorphisms, alternative embeddings, order-42 isomorphism classes, complete boundary solutions, and the global R(5,5) search are not covered.
space_reduction.next_bulk_elimination: Test whether one certified two-orbit exclusion has a deletion-minimal raw K5-clause core of at most 20 clauses.

tactical_learning.prediction: Every small orbit retains a sorted representative, the row-sorted source is a positive control, and one post-block model is exactly classifiable.
tactical_learning.observation: All controls passed. CaDiCaL found a valid model in 4.849 seconds, but nauty and NetworkX identify it as supplied source record 12.
tactical_learning.surprise: The delegate projection of 175 clauses per comparator was one too high. Exact reconstruction and truth-table testing establish 174 clauses: 30 order clauses, four first-prefix clauses, and 28 groups of five later-prefix clauses.
tactical_learning.failure_signature: A sound label quotient still returns another supplied class because it does not block isomorphism classes.
tactical_learning.bottleneck_update: The remaining boundary bottleneck is compact class-level canonical augmentation, not destroy-label redundancy.

reusable_assets.name: Record-21 lex quotient generator
reusable_assets.use: Regenerate the exact no-Hamming CNF and exhaustive tied-row gate.

reusable_assets.name: Independent adversarial cold checker
reusable_assets.use: Reconstruct raw and lex clauses, evaluate the model, and verify target isomorphism.

constraints_learned.constraint: Allowing tied rows gives exactly 2^66*C(2^30+11,12) sorted assignments, not 2^426/12!.
constraints_learned.scope: The fixed record-21 boundary primary universe.
constraints_learned.evidence: Combinations-with-repetition count and exhaustive tied-row coverage.

tactical_learning.next_discriminator: Deletion-minimize one certified two-orbit raw clause set and stop if the first exact core exceeds 20 clauses.

prior_art_check.exact_delta: A static, explicitly coverage-checked S_12 boundary quotient; not a new Ramsey construction or class-exclusion mechanism.
prior_art_check.duplicate_risk: The solver may merely rediscover another supplied class; this occurred with source record 12.
prior_art_check.comparison_test: Use sorted source record 21 as a positive control, block it once, and classify exactly one subsequent model.

field_progress_assessment.contribution_class: verified local symmetry reduction and research software
field_progress_assessment.closest_prior_result: Historical common-subgraph searches returned only the supplied 656 graphs; the previous local experiment produced 64 labelled vectors but eight row normal forms.
field_progress_assessment.measurable_improvement: Exact 479001570.5570708... reduction of labelled assignments in one fixed-core boundary; no class or Ramsey-bound improvement.
field_progress_assessment.independent_validation: The cold checker reconstructed 196998 raw clauses and all eleven lex gadgets, checked all 198913 physical clauses, obtained clique number four in both colors, and confirmed the record-12 isomorphism.
field_progress_assessment.remains_unproved: No new order-42 class, K43 witness, boundary exclusion, corpus completeness result, or improved R(5,5) bound.
field_progress_assessment.route_recommendation: Redirect to proof-core compression because further individual boundary blocks lack a credible field-progress path.

summary: The local quotient is sound and passed every distinct-row, tied-row, source, DIMACS, graph, isomorphism, and adversarial control. After blocking sorted source record 21, the single permitted model was supplied source record 12. No Ramsey bound changed.
rationale: The exhaustive and independent controls establish the exact scoped reduction, while supplied-corpus membership triggers the predeclared stop and forbids novelty or exclusion claims.
claims: The row-sorted quotient covers every S_12 destroy-label orbit in the fixed record-21 boundary.
The quotient represents exactly 2^66*C(2^30+11,12) primary assignments.
The one post-block model is a valid Ramsey(5,5,42) graph isomorphic to supplied source record 12.
evidence: CHECKPOINT.md; epoch-16 replay instructions and continuation
next_steps: Select one retained burden-zero two-orbit slice.
Strip all auxiliary and symmetry structure to raw K5 clauses.
Deletion-minimize with exact UNSAT checks and independently verify every surviving five-set origin.
Stop immediately if the first core exceeds 20 clauses.
experiments: .proof-experiments/20260721-172006-427f4a: exhaustive production gate passed; one SAT model found in 4.849 seconds
.proof-experiments/20260721-172356-d34034: independent physical reconstruction and adversarial transposition audit passed
independent_checker: checkers/novel42_lex_quotient_audit.py imports no producer, independently reconstructs the raw and lex clauses, evaluates all 198913 clauses, validates graph semantics and record-12 isomorphism, and verifies that an unsorted destroy transposition preserves raw Ramsey clauses but is rejected by lex order.
transfer_insights: Group-action canonicalization -> sorting core-neighborhood rows should retain an orbit representative despite ties -> exhaustive S_3 controls and the S_12 production/adversarial audits passed.

established_facts.claim: The record-21 boundary row quotient is covering and has exact represented size 2^66*C(2^30+11,12).
established_facts.evidence: Production report and independent adversarial cold audit.

established_facts.claim: The one post-block model is valid and isomorphic to supplied source record 12.
established_facts.evidence: Two exact graph checkers, physical DIMACS evaluation, nauty, and NetworkX.

ruled_out.claim_or_route: Continue the same quotient formula with an arbitrary larger individual-normal-form cutoff.
ruled_out.scope: This record-21 fixed core and primary-vector blocks.
ruled_out.reason: The quotient is not a class block, and the first post-source-block model is another supplied class.
ruled_out.reopen_condition: A proved class-level block or canonical augmentation, an artifact defect, or a predeclared experiment that directly meets a field-progress gate.

open_leads.description: Compress a certified two-orbit exclusion into a raw K5-clause obstruction theorem.
open_leads.rationale: A first core of at most 20 clauses is the cheapest discriminator for the named structural-theorem gate.
open_leads.next_experiment: Deletion-minimize one raw clause set with exact UNSAT checks and independently verify its five-set origins.

blocker: No sound compact isomorphism-class block or canonical augmentation exists for the boundary.
reopen_condition: Provide a proved class-level block or canonical augmentation, or demonstrate a source, mapping, comparator, or checker defect.
reopen_evidence: The previous labelled-block strategy's symmetry-quotient condition is satisfied by this packet; the remaining blocker is class-level rather than label-level.

candidate_profile.scholarly_question: Can destroy-label symmetry be removed soundly from one exact order-42 frozen-core Ramsey boundary?
candidate_profile.meaningful_delta: An exact local quotient with exhaustive tied-row coverage, a deterministic CNF, and an independent adversarial checker.
candidate_profile.acceptance_test: Accept only the scoped quotient count and reproducibility packet; reject any class, boundary, corpus-completeness, or Ramsey-bound claim.

closest_prior_work.difference: Historical common-subgraph searches did not provide this local CNF quotient packet or its tied-row coverage audit.

novelty_searches.source: Dynamic Survey and McKay-Radziszowski primary paper
novelty_searches.query: R(5,5), current bound, order-42 common-subgraph searches
novelty_searches.finding: The exact value remains open at 43 <= R(5,5) <= 46, and known-class rediscovery is only a control.

external_channel.acceptance_path: No external submission is justified for this local infrastructure result.

continuation.objective: Test whether one certified two-orbit exclusion has a raw core of at most 20 clauses.
continuation.first_action: Use the retained burden-zero slice artifacts to generate a raw-clause-only instance, then deletion-minimize with exact replay and independent origin mapping.
continuation.stop_condition: Stop on a core larger than 20 clauses, an origin-map failure, or non-replayable UNSAT; consider the 20-distance atlas only after the first threshold passes.

campaign_assessment.reason: One different bounded structural discriminator remains cheap and has an explicit theorem-level acceptance threshold.

strategy_proposals.family: proof-core compression for structured Ramsey exclusions
strategy_proposals.mechanism: Deletion-minimize raw K5 clauses and canonicalize signed-incidence cores across the certified two-orbit slices.
strategy_proposals.hypothesis: The first core has at most 20 clauses, and the 20 slices may collapse to at most five templates.
strategy_proposals.discriminating_test: Test the at-most-20-clause threshold on one slice before constructing an atlas.
strategy_proposals.rationale: This redirects from known-class sampling toward a possible human-checkable structural lemma.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol was the campaign-designated principal. Supplied GPT-5.6 Terra literature-strategy and experiment-verification delegates were advisory; their artifacts were promoted with provenance. Sol independently audited the primary sources, corrected the comparator count, implemented and ran the producer, and wrote the cold checker. Deterministic tools were Python 3.12.3, GCC 13.3.0, CaDiCaL 1.7.3, nauty labelg, NetworkX 3.3, curl, pdftotext, jq, SHA-256, and the computational-researcher experiment harness. No new subagent, CAS, proof assistant, external publication, remote account, or system-level change was used.; orchestration: gpt-5.6-sol principal with gpt-5.6-terra delegates.
